'''鈭歨-zh-t''' ('''hazhata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chasse|chasse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chasse|chasse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-zh-t
|-
! Lemma
| hazhata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhatithi|hazhatithi]] || [[word:hazhatiji|hazhatiji]] || [[word:hazhatishi|hazhatishi]] || [[word:hazhati|hazhati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhatuthuth|hazhatuthuth]] || [[word:hazhatujuj|hazhatujuj]] || [[word:hazhatushush|hazhatushush]] || [[word:hazhat|hazhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhatuthu|hazhatuthu]] || [[word:hazhatuju|hazhatuju]] || [[word:hazhatushu|hazhatushu]] || [[word:hazhatu|hazhatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhatufuth|hazhatufuth]] || [[word:hazhatufuj|hazhatufuj]] || [[word:hazhatufush|hazhatufush]] || [[word:hazhatuf|hazhatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhatethe|hazhatethe]] || [[word:hazhateje|hazhateje]] || [[word:hazhateshe|hazhateshe]] || [[word:hazhate|hazhate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhatothoth|hazhatothoth]] || [[word:hazhatojoj|hazhatojoj]] || [[word:hazhatoshosh|hazhatoshosh]] || [[word:hazhat|hazhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhatotho|hazhatotho]] || [[word:hazhatojo|hazhatojo]] || [[word:hazhatosho|hazhatosho]] || [[word:hazhato|hazhato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhatofoth|hazhatofoth]] || [[word:hazhatofoj|hazhatofoj]] || [[word:hazhatofosh|hazhatofosh]] || [[word:hazhatof|hazhatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhat忙th忙|hazhat忙th忙]] || [[word:hazhat忙j忙|hazhat忙j忙]] || [[word:hazhat忙sh忙|hazhat忙sh忙]] || [[word:hazhat忙|hazhat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhatathath|hazhatathath]] || [[word:hazhatajaj|hazhatajaj]] || [[word:hazhatashash|hazhatashash]] || [[word:hazhat|hazhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhatatha|hazhatatha]] || [[word:hazhataja|hazhataja]] || [[word:hazhatasha|hazhatasha]] || [[word:hazhata|hazhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhatafath|hazhatafath]] || [[word:hazhatafaj|hazhatafaj]] || [[word:hazhatafash|hazhatafash]] || [[word:hazhataf|hazhataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hazhatasha|hazhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohazhatasha|gohazhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihazhatasha|gokihazhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hazhatn眉sha|hazhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohazhatnkn眉sha|gohazhatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhatn眉sha|gokihazhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazhatsh毛sha|hazhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazhatnksh毛sha|gohazhatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazhatsh毛sha|gokihazhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhatrosha|hazhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhatnkrosha|gohazhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhatrosha|gokihazhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatmusha|hazhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhatnkmusha|gohazhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhatmusha|gokihazhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hazhatsherasha|hazhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohazhatnksherasha|gohazhatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihazhatsherasha|gokihazhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hazhatngasha|hazhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohazhatnkngasha|gohazhatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihazhatngasha|gokihazhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hazhatyasha|hazhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohazhatnkyasha|gohazhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihazhatyasha|gokihazhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hazhatyamasha|hazhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohazhatnkyamasha|gohazhatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihazhatyamasha|gokihazhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhatn眉sh毛sha|hazhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhatnkn眉sh毛sha|gohazhatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhatn眉sh毛sha|gokihazhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhatn眉rosha|hazhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhatnkn眉rosha|gohazhatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhatn眉rosha|gokihazhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatn眉musha|hazhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhatnkn眉musha|gohazhatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhatn眉musha|gokihazhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhatsh毛n眉sha|hazhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhatnksh毛n眉sha|gohazhatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhatsh毛n眉sha|gokihazhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhatsh毛rosha|hazhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhatnksh毛rosha|gohazhatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhatsh毛rosha|gokihazhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatsh毛musha|hazhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhatnksh毛musha|gohazhatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhatsh毛musha|gokihazhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhatron眉sha|hazhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhatnkron眉sha|gohazhatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhatron眉sha|gokihazhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhatrosh毛sha|hazhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhatnkrosh毛sha|gohazhatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhatrosh毛sha|gokihazhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatromusha|hazhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhatnkromusha|gohazhatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhatromusha|gokihazhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhatmun眉sha|hazhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhatnkmun眉sha|gohazhatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhatmun眉sha|gokihazhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhatmush毛sha|hazhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhatnkmush毛sha|gohazhatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhatmush毛sha|gokihazhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhatmurosha|hazhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhatnkmurosha|gohazhatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhatmurosha|gokihazhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hazhat|hazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙zh忙t|h忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohazhat|hohazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙zh忙t|hoh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohazhat|hohohazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙zh忙t|hohoh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hazhat|n眉hazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙zh忙t|n眉h忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hazhat|n眉n眉hazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙zh忙t|n眉n眉h忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hazhat|n茂hazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙zh忙t|n茂h忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hazhat|n茂n茂hazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙zh忙t|n茂n茂h忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhazhat|luhazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙zh忙t|luh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhazhat|luluhazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙zh忙t|luluh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihazhat|lihazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙zh忙t|lih忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihazhat|lilihazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙zh忙t|lilih忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohazhat|kohazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙zh忙t|koh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohazhat|kokohazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙zh忙t|kokoh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehazhat|kehazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙zh忙t|keh忙zh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehazhat|kekehazhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙zh忙t|kekeh忙zh忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
